name: Recruiter: Archive a candidate from a project
description: Archive (Recruiter's way to remove from the active pipeline — there is no hard delete) a specific candidate from a project. Params: the project pipeline URL (step 1) and the candidate NAME in the archive selector (step 4). The Archive button is [data-test-component='archive-profiles-btn'] (stable/locale-independent) but there's one per row, so we target the specific person by name via the accessibility/text label ('Archive <Name> …' / 'Archivar a <Name> …'); a generic css would hit whoever is on top. Archiving applies the AI 'doesn't seem fit' reason and moves the candidate to 'Archived candidates'. Selectors captured live 2026-06-08. NOTE: built from captured selectors but NOT live-run-verified (to avoid archiving an active candidate); verify on a deliberate target via the 'Archived candidates' count. If a confirm dialog appears, a follow-up confirm click may be needed.

steps.intent: let archive apply / any confirm settle
